questions.options: ["Wall Mounted Jib","Pillar Mounted Jib","Free Standing (360°) Jib","Articulating Jib"]

questions.question_text: Maximum Rated Capacity (MRC) signage clearly displayed and legible?
Base plate, grout and foundation condition acceptable?
Supply isolator present, labelled and functional?
Jib arm / boom free from cracks or deformation?
Pivot head assembly and slew bearing condition acceptable?
Festoon system and cabling condition acceptable?
Slew brake or locking device functional?
Slew control panel and components acceptable?
Trolley end stops fitted and secure?
Trolley electrical panel and components acceptable?
Hoist electrical panel and components acceptable?
Hoist limit switch wiring and protection acceptable?
Warning labels and safety signage legible?

questions.options: {"Crane is Operational","Operate with Limitations","Unsafe to Operate"}
